title: The Unsinkable Molly Brown
writer: Helen Deutsch, Richard Morris, Meredith Willson
actors: Debbie Reynolds, Harve Presnell, Ed Begley
plot: A poor, uneducated mountain girl leaves her cabin in search of respect, a wealthy husband, and a better life in this fictionalized biopic of Margaret "Molly" Brown, who survived the 1912 sinking of the RMS Titanic.
awards: Nominated for 6 Oscars. 5 wins & 13 nominations total
